headline: Workday (WDAY) Embeds AI-Powered Employee Recognition Into Its HR Platform
summary: Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ:WDAY) is one of the best falling stocks to invest in now. On April 16, Workday, Inc. (NASDAQ:WDAY) and employee recognition software firm Achievers jointly announced the availability of Workday Recognition. Workday Recognition is an artificial-intelligence-powered employee recognition and rewards solution, which is provided by Achievers, and embedded directly into Workday’s Human Capital […]

headline: Is Workday (WDAY) Pricing Look Misaligned After Sharp Year To Date Share Price Slide
summary: If you are wondering whether Workday's current share price reflects its true worth, you are not alone. This article looks at what the numbers suggest about value. With the stock at US$119.76 after a 6.4% decline over the last 7 days, 3.6% over 30 days, and a 41.8% drop year to date, many investors are reassessing both upside potential and risk. Recent headlines have kept attention on Workday, with coverage focusing on how software names with large established customer bases are being...
